title: Creamy French Fennel Bulb Boeuf Bourguignon
description: A yeasty, pillowy, monsoon inspired stew featuring roasted fennel, carrots, mushrooms and a creamy finish, vegetarian-friendly and delightfully French.
instructions: Toss fennel wedges, carrots, and onion with olive oil, salt, pepper, thyme, and bay leaf; roast in oven for 25 minutes until caramelized.
While vegetables roast, melt butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat and add mushrooms; cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, then pour in white wine to deglaze the pan, scraping up browned bits.
Stir in vegetable broth and simmer for 10 minutes until the liquid reduces slightly.
Add roasted vegetables to the pot and cover; let the stew simmer on low for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Whisk flour with a splash of cream to make a slurry, then stir into the stew to thicken, cooking for another 5 minutes.
Stir in remaining heavy cream, adjust seasoning with salt and pepper, and heat through until hot.
Remove thyme sprigs and bay leaf before serving.
Ladle stew into bowls, garnish with fresh rosemary if desired, and serve hot.
